title: staelia thymbroides
intro: Staelia thymbroides, also known as the False Thyme, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antiseptic and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Staelia thymbroides include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Staelia thymbroides can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
